description:
You are a web developer who has received a bug report: the employee directory application at http://localhost:8080 is completely broken — it shows only a loading spinner that never resolves. The application source code is in ~/webapp/ (index.html, app.js, style.css, and data/employees.json).

Using Firefox Developer Tools, diagnose the root cause and fix it. After each fix, reload the page — you may discover that resolving one issue reveals deeper problems underneath. Continue investigating and fixing until the application is fully functional: it should display a styled table of 10 employees with their names, departments, and email addresses, and the search feature should correctly filter results by name or department.

After all issues are resolved, create ~/Documents/incident_report.json containing an array of objects, each documenting a bug you fixed: "symptom" (what you observed), "root_cause" (what was wrong in the code), "file_modified" (which source file you changed), "fix_applied" (what you changed), and "devtools_panel" (which Developer Tools panel helped diagnose it).

Bookmark the working application URL in a "Development" bookmark folder.
